title: Fragment - Stars.
content:
The fields of space gleam bright, as if some ancient giant, old
     As the moon and her extinguished mountains,
    Had dipped his fingers huge into the twilight's sea of gold
     And sprinkled all the heavens from these fountains.
meaning:
Madison Julius Cawein's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Fragment - Stars."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
